heading: Commissions of auctioneers
label: 8875 Commissions of auctioneers

children.text: ½ of 1 percent on any amount exceeding $10,000 on the sale of a vessel; and
1 percent on any amount exceeding $10,000 on the sale of other prize property.

children.label: b
children.text: If no such scale is established, auctioneers in prize causes shall be paid such compensation as the court considers just under the circumstances of each case.
